name: unbanChatSenderChat
description: Use this method to unban a previously banned channel chat in a supergroup or channel. The bot must be an administrator for this to work and must have the appropriate administrator rights

parameters.name: chat_id
parameters.description: Unique identifier for the target chat or username of the target channel in the format @username

parameters.name: sender_chat_id
parameters.description: Unique identifier of the target sender chat
